en-US.label: Productivity
en-US.description: Tools that boost individual and team productivity, including task management, time management, note organization, and knowledge management.

zh-CN.label: 效率
zh-CN.description: 提升个人与团队工作效率的工具类 Agent/Skill，包括任务管理、时间管理、笔记整理、知识管理等

en-US.label: Development
en-US.description: Software development helpers, including code review, bug diagnosis, technical documentation generation, and dev environment management.

zh-CN.label: 开发
zh-CN.description: 软件开发辅助工具，包括代码审查、Bug 诊断、技术文档生成、开发环境管理等

en-US.label: Business
en-US.description: Business and project management tools, including market analysis, financial modeling, project planning, and customer relationship management.

zh-CN.label: 商业
zh-CN.description: 商务与项目管理工具，包括市场分析、财务建模、项目规划、客户关系管理等

en-US.label: Creative
en-US.description: Design and content creation tools, including copywriting, creative writing, visual design assistance, and multimedia production.

zh-CN.label: 创意
zh-CN.description: 设计与内容创作工具，包括文案策划、创意写作、视觉设计辅助、多媒体制作等

en-US.label: Media
en-US.description: Multimedia generation and processing skills for images, audio, and video.

zh-CN.label: 媒体
zh-CN.description: 图片、语音、视频等多媒体生成与处理技能

en-US.label: Communication
en-US.description: Communication and collaboration tools, including translation, email management, meeting assistance, customer support, and cross-cultural communication.

zh-CN.label: 沟通
zh-CN.description: 沟通协作工具，包括翻译、邮件管理、会议辅助、客服应答、跨文化交流等

en-US.label: Data
en-US.description: Data analysis and visualization tools, including data cleaning, statistical analysis, business intelligence, and report generation.

zh-CN.label: 数据
zh-CN.description: 数据分析与可视化工具，包括数据清洗、统计分析、商业智能、报表生成等

en-US.label: Management
en-US.description: System management and orchestration tools, including task scheduling, agent management, global monitoring, and system configuration.

zh-CN.label: 管理
zh-CN.description: 系统管理与编排工具，包括任务调度、Agent 管理、全局监控、系统配置等
